<a name="ExtractImageRef"></a>

## func [ExtractImageRef](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L299>)

```go
func ExtractImageRef(sourceIdentifier string) string
```

ExtractImageRef extracts the image reference from a BuildKit\-style source identifier. It returns the original identifier if it's not a docker\-image:// reference.

<a name="ImageSourceIdentifier"></a>

## func [ImageSourceIdentifier](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L269>)

```go
func ImageSourceIdentifier(imageRef string) string
```

ImageSourceIdentifier creates a BuildKit\-style source identifier for a docker image. This normalizes image references to the format "docker\-image://registry/repo:tag".

<a name="Action"></a>

## type [Action](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L22>)

Action represents the action to take when a rule matches.

```go
type Action string
```

<a name="ActionAllow"></a>

```go
const (
    // ActionAllow explicitly allows a source (no transformation).
    ActionAllow Action = "ALLOW"
    // ActionDeny blocks the source and fails the build.
    ActionDeny Action = "DENY"
    // ActionConvert transforms the source to a different reference.
    ActionConvert Action = "CONVERT"
)
```

<a name="Decision"></a>

## type [Decision](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L87-L96>)

Decision represents the result of evaluating a source against a policy.

```go
type Decision struct {
    // Action is the action to take (ALLOW, DENY, or CONVERT).
    Action Action

    // TargetRef is the new reference to use (for CONVERT actions).
    TargetRef string

    // Reason provides context for the decision (e.g., which rule matched).
    Reason string
}
```

<a name="MatchType"></a>

## type [MatchType](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L34>)

MatchType represents how the selector identifier should be matched.

```go
type MatchType string
```

<a name="MatchTypeExact"></a>

```go
const (
    // MatchTypeExact requires an exact string match.
    MatchTypeExact MatchType = "EXACT"
    // MatchTypeWildcard allows * and ? glob patterns.
    MatchTypeWildcard MatchType = "WILDCARD"
    // MatchTypeRegex allows regular expression patterns (not implemented in MVP).
    MatchTypeRegex MatchType = "REGEX"
)
```

<a name="Policy"></a>

## type [Policy](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L80-L84>)

Policy represents a source policy containing multiple rules.

```go
type Policy struct {
    // Rules is the list of policy rules, evaluated in order.
    // First matching rule wins.
    Rules []Rule `json:"rules"`
}
```

<a name="LoadFromFile"></a>

### func [LoadFromFile](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L99>)

```go
func LoadFromFile(path string) (*Policy, error)
```

LoadFromFile loads a source policy from a JSON file.

<a name="Parse"></a>

### func [Parse](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L109>)

```go
func Parse(data []byte) (*Policy, error)
```

Parse parses a source policy from JSON data.

<a name="Policy.Evaluate"></a>

### func \(\*Policy\) [Evaluate](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L177>)

```go
func (p *Policy) Evaluate(sourceIdentifier string) (Decision, bool, error)
```

Evaluate checks a source identifier against the policy and returns a decision. The first matching rule wins. If no rule matches, returns \(Decision\{\}, false, nil\).

<a name="Policy.Validate"></a>

### func \(\*Policy\) [Validate](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L123>)

```go
func (p *Policy) Validate() error
```

Validate checks that the policy is well\-formed.

<a name="Rule"></a>

## type [Rule](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L68-L77>)

Rule represents a single policy rule.

```go
type Rule struct {
    // Action specifies what to do when this rule matches.
    Action Action `json:"action"`

    // Selector specifies which sources this rule applies to.
    Selector Selector `json:"selector"`

    // Updates specifies how to transform the source (for CONVERT action).
    Updates *Updates `json:"updates,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="Rule.Matches"></a>

### func \(\*Rule\) [Matches](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L206>)

```go
func (r *Rule) Matches(sourceIdentifier string) (bool, error)
```

Matches checks if a source identifier matches this rule's selector.

<a name="Rule.Validate"></a>

### func \(\*Rule\) [Validate](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L139>)

```go
func (r *Rule) Validate() error
```

Validate checks that a rule is well\-formed.

<a name="Selector"></a>

## type [Selector](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L46-L54>)

Selector specifies which sources a rule applies to.

```go
type Selector struct {
    // Identifier is the source identifier to match.
    // For docker images, this is typically "docker-image://registry/repo:tag".
    Identifier string `json:"identifier"`

    // MatchType specifies how the identifier should be matched.
    // Defaults to EXACT if not specified.
    MatchType MatchType `json:"matchType,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="Updates"></a>

## type [Updates](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/sourcepolicy/policy.go#L57-L65>)

Updates specifies how to transform a matched source.

```go
type Updates struct {
    // Identifier is the new source identifier to use.
    // For CONVERT actions, this replaces the original identifier.
    Identifier string `json:"identifier,omitempty"`

    // Attrs contains additional attributes (e.g., http.checksum).
    // Reserved for future use with HTTP sources.
    Attrs map[string]string `json:"attrs,omitempty"`
}
```

# supplemented

```go
import "github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/supplemented"
```

This package is deprecated. Its functionality has been moved to github.com/containers/common/pkg/supplemented, which provides the same API. The stubs and aliases here are present for compatibility with older code. New implementations should use github.com/containers/common/pkg/supplemented directly.

<a name="MirrorToTempFileIfPathIsDescriptor"></a>

## func [MirrorToTempFileIfPathIsDescriptor](<https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/main/pkg/util/util.go#L19>)

```go
func MirrorToTempFileIfPathIsDescriptor(file string) (string, bool)
```

Mirrors path to a tmpfile if path points to a file descriptor instead of actual file on filesystem reason: operations with file descriptors are can lead to edge cases where content on FD is not in a consumable state after first consumption. returns path as string and bool to confirm if temp file was created and needs to be cleaned up.
